mapper.select: SELECT kakao_place_id AS kakaoPlaceId, place_name AS placeName, category_name AS categoryName, phone, address_name AS addressName, road_address_name AS roadAddressName, longitude, latitude, place_url AS placeUrl, last_fetched_at AS lastFetchedAt, next_refresh_at AS nextRefreshAt FROM cafe WHERE kakao_place_id = #{kakaoPlaceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cafe ( kakao_place_id, place_name, category_name, phone, address_name, road_address_name, longitude, latitude, place_url, last_fetched_at, next_refresh_at ) VALUES ( #{kakaoPlaceId}, #{placeName}, #{categoryName}, #{phone}, #{addressName}, #{roadAddressName}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{placeUrl}, #{lastFetchedAt}, #{nextRefreshAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE place_name = VALUES(place_name), category_name = VALUES(category_name), phone = VALUES(phone), address_name = VALUES(address_name), road_address_name = VALUES(road_address_name), longitude = VALUES(longitude), latitude = VALUES(latitude), place_url = VALUES(place_url), last_fetched_at = VALUES(last_fetched_at), next_refresh_at = VALUES(next_refresh_at)

INSERT INTO cafe ( kakao_place_id, place_name, category_name, phone, address_name, road_address_name, longitude, latitude, place_url, last_fetched_at, next_refresh_at ) VALUES
( #{cafe.kakaoPlaceId}, #{cafe.placeName}, #{cafe.categoryName}, #{cafe.phone}, #{cafe.addressName}, #{cafe.roadAddressName}, #{cafe.longitude}, #{cafe.latitude}, #{cafe.placeUrl}, #{cafe.lastFetchedAt}, #{cafe.nextRefreshAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE place_name = VALUES(place_name), category_name = VALUES(category_name), phone = VALUES(phone), address_name = VALUES(address_name), road_address_name = VALUES(road_address_name), longitude = VALUES(longitude), latitude = VALUES(latitude), place_url = VALUES(place_url), last_fetched_at = VALUES(last_fetched_at), next_refresh_at = VALUES(next_refresh_at)
